name: Southern Oyster Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oyster liquor to a boiling point.
2. Add the oysters and simmer until their edges curl.
3. Scald the milk, then add the butter, remaining oysters, oyster liquor, salt, and pepper.
4. Serve immediately in hot soup bowls. Sprinkle with a dash of paprika before serving.
